 *   <symbol> ::= <scheme> ' ' <package> ' ' (<descriptor>)+ | 'local ' <local-id>
 *   <package> ::= <manager> ' ' <package-name> ' ' <version>
 *
 * Descriptor suffixes:
 *   /  - namespace
 *   #  - type
 *   .  - term
 *   () - method (with optional disambiguator like ().disambiguator.)

 *   () - parameter
 *   :  - meta
 *   !  - macro
 */
